varieties.name: Tall Utah 52-70
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated; Dark green stalks, 30-45cm tall, vigorous growth, All-America Selections winner
varieties.flesh_fruit: Crisp, stringless, mild and sweet flavor
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection (Australia), Eden Seeds, Quality Plants & Seedlings (QLD)

varieties.name: Tall Utah 52-70R Improved
varieties.origin: USA, improved selection from Tall Utah
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Dark green stalks, compact at 45cm height, improved disease resistance

varieties.name: Tango
varieties.traits: Hybrid; Dark green, smooth stalks, 45-50cm tall, vigorous upright growth
varieties.flesh_fruit: Tender, sweet, nearly stringless, superior texture

varieties.name: Monterey
varieties.traits: Hybrid; Dark green stalks, 30cm height, bolt resistant, market-leading in southern Europe

varieties.name: Conquistador
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Medium green stalks, compact growth
varieties.flesh_fruit: Crisp, light sweet flavor, crunchy texture

varieties.name: Ventura
varieties.traits: Hybrid; Large, uniform stalks, consistent growth pattern

varieties.name: Afina
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Tall slender stalks up to 75cm, dark green, hardy, quick-growing
varieties.availability: European seed suppliers, some Australian importers

varieties.name: Golden Self-Blanching
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated; Golden-yellow stalks, dwarf compact habit 50-60cm, self-blanching, deep ribs

varieties.name: Golden Pascal (Giant Pascal)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated; Yellowish-green stalks, 50cm tall, cold tolerant

varieties.name: White Plume (Henderson's White Plume)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated; Compact stalks 30cm tall, light green leaves forming plume, dwarf

varieties.name: Chinese Celery (Kintsai, Nan Ling)
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated, Apium graveolens var. secalinum; Thin, hollow stems, light green, delicate, strongly flavored leaves
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection Australia, Asian seed suppliers, widely available

varieties.name: Pink Plume (Peppermint Stick)
varieties.traits: Heirloom; Red and white striped stalks, bicolored, compact growth, slow bolting

varieties.name: Giant Red
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Large red-purple stalks, dark green leaves, reddish-purple exterior
varieties.flesh_fruit: Yellow-pink hearts, hearty robust flavor, wonderful taste - considered best by many

varieties.name: Redventure
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Full red and pink stalks, dark green leaves, striking appearance

varieties.name: Par-cel (Zwolche Krul)
varieties.traits: Heirloom Dutch variety, leaf celery; Resembles curly parsley, leafy growth, similar appearance to parsley

varieties.name: Giant Prague (Large Smooth Prague)
varieties.traits: Heirloom, Apium graveolens var. rapaceum; Knobby brown root, 8-12cm diameter, white interior
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, crisp, strong celery flavor, easy to peel

varieties.name: Brilliant
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Round medium roots, smoother than other varieties, white skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Nearly fiberless white roots, sweet nutty flavor

varieties.name: Monarch
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Attractive white smooth skin, deep globes, healthy foliage, easy to peel
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good interior, excellent raw or cooked, smooth
varieties.yield_notes: Large uniform roots, long storage tolerance, resistant to bolting
varieties.availability: Mary's Heirloom Seeds, European seed companies

varieties.name: Prinz
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Compact plant, deep globe, smooth white skin, healthy foliage
varieties.yield_notes: Smaller roots, easier to grow than celery

varieties.name: Tango
varieties.traits: Hybrid; Dark green smooth stalks, vigorous upright, 45-50cm tall

varieties.name: Monterey
varieties.traits: Hybrid; Dark green stalks, bolt resistant, market-leading warm climate variety
varieties.availability: Import through agricultural cooperatives, international seed companies

varieties.name: Conquistador
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Medium green, compact growth, drought resistant
varieties.availability: International seed suppliers, can be sourced through Kerala agricultural networks

varieties.name: Utah 52-70 (Tall Utah)
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Dark green, tall 30-45cm, vigorous

varieties.name: Chinese Celery (Kintsai, Nan Ling)
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated, Apium graveolens var. secalinum; Thin hollow stems, light green, delicate, strongly flavored
varieties.availability: East West Seeds, Namdhari Seeds, Kerala agricultural stores, Asian seed suppliers

varieties.name: Indian Seed Crop Varieties
varieties.origin: India - introduced from France circa 1940, adapted for Indian conditions
varieties.traits: Annual type grown primarily for seed (Ajmoda); Herbaceous plant 60-120cm, white flowers in compound umbels, well-developed succulent root
varieties.yield_notes: Seed crop, requires warm days/cool nights, low humidity
varieties.availability: Local Kerala agricultural suppliers, Ayurvedic medicine shops, traditional seed savers

varieties.name: Punjab Celery 1
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated, first developed Indian variety; Brown color seeds, flowers March
varieties.yield_notes: Average seed yield 4.46 quintals/acre, 140-150 days after transplant

varieties.name: RRL-85-1
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Bred for Indian conditions

varieties.name: TNAU Ooty-1
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated, developed for South Indian conditions; Adapted for South Indian hill stations

varieties.name: Giant Pascal
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Grows well in winter, 12-15cm long

varieties.name: Emperor (Emperor of Jeen)
varieties.traits: Open-pollinated; Adapted for tropical conditions

varieties.name: Golden Self-Blanching
varieties.traits: Heirloom, open-pollinated; Golden-yellow, dwarf 50-60cm, self-blanching

varieties.name: Ventura
varieties.traits: Hybrid; Large uniform stalks, disease resistant
varieties.availability: International seed suppliers, import through agricultural channels
